name: Kaiser Rolls- 9 Rolls (15 Rolls)
recipeIngredient: poppy seeds for sprinkling on top
recipeInstructions:
1. Set machine on dough cycle. When dough is ready, remove from machine and divide into the required number of rolls.
2. Flatten each roll to 1/2 inch thick.
3. Cover with towel and let rise about 45 minutes (or until doubled) in a warm place.
4. Preheat oven to 425°F.
5. Brush tops with water and sprinkle poppy seeds.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes. When properly done, the rolls should be golden brown and sound hollow when tapped. Very crispy and good.
